tool_input.prompt: Extract the complete Claude Code hooks specification. Include: (1) every hook event name (PreToolUse, PostToolUse, UserPromptSubmit, Notification, Stop, SubagentStop, PreCompact, SessionStart, SessionEnd, etc.), (2) the exact JSON input schema for each event, (3) the JSON output/control schema (decision, continue, stopReason, hookSpecificOutput), (4) matcher semantics (tool name regex, etc.), (5) exit code meanings (0, 2, other), (6) the settings.json configuration shape, (7) any "additionalContext" or permission-decision fields, (8) timeout and parallelism rules. Be exhaustive — list fields verbatim.
